title: toelkenia lactea
intro: Toelkenia lactea, also known as the White Toadflax, is a flowering plant species in the figwort family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to calm digestive issues and soothe inflammation. The health benefits of Toelkenia lactea include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Toelkenia lactea is often combined with other medicinal plants to create teas, infusions, and topical creams that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
